resultList.dtldesc: Nestled in the heart of Chennai, Kanathur, this 4 BHK Villa available for sale offers a perfect blend of urban convenience and coastal charm. Enjoy the benefits of serene surroundings, proximity to renowned educational institutions, and seamless connectivity to the city. Settle in Kanathur and create cherished memories with your loved ones amidst the comfort and opulence of this vibrant neighbourhood. Property Specifications and Facilities Embraced by panoramic views and adorned with elegant lights and fans, this east-facing G 2 floor villa offers an unparalleled living experience. Offering all the rights of freehold ownership, this unfurnished residence promises a blend of sophistication and comfort, while the Kajaria tiles create a seamless blend of aesthetics and functionality.The ground floor spread over an area of 540 sq ft offers you a generously sized living room where you can enjoy leisure time with your loved ones, while the dining area offers ample space for you and your family. This floor also encompasses a well-designed kitchen which has a granite platform and stainless steel sink where you can enjoy cooking, while for personal use, there is a toilet available. Crafted to perfection utilizing every inch of 730 sq ft, the first floor comprises 2 lavish bedrooms and 2 washrooms, where one bathroom is attached to the bedroom and the other is available for common use. Additionally, there are 3 airy balconies on this floor that witness the breathtaking views of the surrounding landscape, where 2 balconies are attached to the 2 bedrooms and the 3rd balcony opens from the family lounge. Finally, on the 2nd floor measuring an area of 370 sq ft, there is another bedroom, a dressing room along with a toilet, a lavish terrace, and a private terrace where you can organize family gatherings. Enjoy the convenience of a covered parking space of 127 sq ft on the ground floor available for one vehicle, and there is also an unrestricted water supply which provides a harmonious living experience.Locality Situated near Mayajaal and behind Sungrilla Snacks, this villa offers proximity to vibrant markets for your shopping needs. Renowned institutions like Sishya OMR School and Swaram Hospital are within reach. Fulfill your daily requirements with ease, thanks to nearby shopping malls, supermarkets, banks, and ATM centers. The villa is well-connected, with the railway station, metro station, and various modes of public transport nearby. Experience the pinnacle of comfort and luxury in the heart of Kanathur, Chennai.
